summary: Community Edition testing completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (32/32). Community theme successfully implemented with white/blue colors. Plant limitations working correctly (1 unlocked, 5 locked with PRO ONLY overlays). Upgrade dialogs functional. Minor auth session persistence issue prevents full navigation testing.

integration_issues.issue: Session token not persisting across page navigations
integration_issues.details: Cookie authentication works initially but session gets lost on navigation. Backend APIs work fine with session token.

passed_tests: All 32 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Login page renders with COMMUNITY EDITION branding
Blue primary accent color (#0055FF) correctly implemented
Dashboard loads with Community branding in sidebar
Plants page shows Community limit banner
Plants page shows 5 locked plants with PRO ONLY overlays
Add Plant button shows 'Add Plant (Pro)' text
Clicking Add Plant button opens Upgrade Pro dialog
Clicking locked plant opens Upgrade Pro dialog
Upgrade dialog shows 'UPGRADE TO PRO' title
Upgrade dialog shows Pro features list
Upgrade dialog has UPGRADE NOW and MAYBE LATER buttons
Community limit banner shows correct text and UPGRADE button
Session token authentication works with backend APIs
Google login button has correct blue background color
No white-on-white text readability issues detected
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session token persistence issue in AuthContext - cookies are not being maintained across page navigations, preventing full frontend testing. Backend APIs work correctly.
